note: The EPD covers four cement products, each with declared unit of 1000 kg. Values reported here are for OPC (Table 4-7): GWP-total 9.96E+02, GWP-fossil 9.90E+02, GWP-biogenic 5.07E+00 kg CO2 eq. Other products: PPC (total 710, fossil 706, biogenic 3.72), PSC (total 487, fossil 485, biogenic 2.62), PCC (total 541, fossil 538, biogenic 2.92). No separate GWP-GHG indicator reported.
